name: marketing-skills
description: 18 marketing skills for founders and technical marketers: CRO (page, form, signup, onboarding, popup, paywall), email sequences, content strategy, social content, pricing, launch strategy, churn prevention, referral programs, marketing psychology, and more. Copywriting and copy-editing have been moved to the dedicated cro-copywriting-mastery plugin. SEO skills have been moved to the dedicated seo-mastery plugin.
